vocab.meaning: người thích ở nhà (hơn là đi ra ngoài chơi)
vocab.example: Unlike my adventurous siblings, I was quite a home bird, spending most of my afternoons building Lego sets in my bedroom.

vocab.meaning: một chủ đề hoặc hoạt động hoàn toàn xa lạ/bí ẩn
vocab.example: Outdoor sports were a bit of a closed book to me as a child; I much preferred the quiet company of my drawing pads.

vocab.meaning: cảm thấy lạc lõng (khi làm một hoạt động không phù hợp)
vocab.example: I felt like a fish out of water whenever I had to play football, as I lacked any sense of athletic coordination.

vocab.meaning: có khiếu trồng trọt, mát tay chăm sóc cây cối
vocab.example: I spent hours in the garden with my grandmother because she had a green thumb, and I loved helping her plant seasonal flowers.

vocab.meaning: thông báo hoặc âm thanh khiến ai đó cực kỳ hạnh phúc
vocab.example: The sound of the ice cream truck was music to my ears after an afternoon of playing tag under the hot sun.

vocab.meaning: một kỹ năng trở nên tự nhiên như bản năng do thực hành nhiều
vocab.example: Climbing the fruit trees in our orchard became second nature to me by the time I was seven or eight years old.

vocab.meaning: khao khát những điều lớn lao, bay bổng (thường chỉ sự tham vọng của trẻ con)
vocab.example: We used to build cardboard rockets and pretend we were reaching for the stars in our imaginary space missions.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ vui sướng, không lo âu
vocab.example: Whenever it rained, I would put on my boots and splash in the puddles, feeling as happy as Larry.

vocab.meaning: trông ngóng thời gian trôi qua (vì quá háo hức đến giờ chơi)
vocab.example: I would constantly watch the clock at school, just waiting for the final bell so I could rush home to play hide-and-seek.

vocab.meaning: một thành tích đáng tự hào (đối với trẻ con)
vocab.example: Winning the neighborhood marbles tournament was a real feather in my cap back in primary school.
